## Summary

Describe what changed.

## Why

Explain the bug, workflow, or improvement this pull request handles.

## Testing

List the checks you ran and the WordPress/WooCommerce setup you used.

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not commit API keys, webhook secrets, customer data, private exports, or local credentials.
- [ ] I ran `php -l quorlyx.php` when PHP files changed.
- [ ] I ran `composer lint:php` when PHP files changed.
- [ ] I kept the change focused and avoided unrelated refactors.
- [ ] I updated docs, screenshots, or GIFs when the user-facing behavior changed.
